message:
feat(web): actionSurfaces module for platform-aware shortcut formatting

Introduces a new `actionSurfaces.ts` module that provides:

- Platform detection (macOS vs default) for shortcut formatting
- `ANALYSIS_SIDEBAR_CATEGORIES`: Declarative configuration for AnalysisSidebar
  tools, linking each tool to its ActionId for single-source-of-truth shortcuts
- `APP_SHELL_FOOTER_HINTS`: Declarative footer hint configuration replacing
  hardcoded shortcut strings
- `ACTION_DRAWER_SECTIONS`: Mobile ActionDrawer configuration with section
  groupings and action metadata (closeAfter, labelStrategy)
- `formatHintKeys()` and `formatActionShortcutForSurface()` utilities for
  rendering platform-appropriate shortcuts (⌘ on macOS, Ctrl on others)
- `getPrimaryShortcutCombo()`: Selects the platform-preferred combo when an
  action has multiple shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+K and Cmd+K)

Also adds:
- New `OverlayLogo` action in ActionRegistry for sequence logo analysis
- Unit tests for platform detection, combo selection, and formatting
- Updated KeyboardManager and validateConflicts tests for consistency

This eliminates shortcut string duplication across components and ensures
the CommandPalette, Footer, AnalysisSidebar, and ActionDrawer all derive
their shortcut hints from ActionRegistry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
